_note: SCHEMA REFERENCE ONLY — generated by process_session.py from a Hansard PDF. Do not edit manually.
card_summary: One-sentence summary shown on the landing page card.
headline_summary: Two-to-three sentence summary shown as the article lede on the session detail page.
extended_summary: Four-to-six paragraph summary covering the main topics, key votes, notable exchanges, and outcomes. Generated exclusively from the Hansard PDF text.
notable_moments: Verbatim or near-verbatim quote or description of a notable exchange, extracted from the transcript.
